title: Arrgaw

'''Arrgaw''' was a major [[Merchant/Legends|trade]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Kira sector/Legends|Kira sector]]. A world [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by impressive trade rings and featuring vast expanses on its surface taken up by warehouses and other corporate structures, Arrgaw lay at the intersection of two important [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]], the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]] and the [[Harrin Trade Corridor]].

During the era of the [[Alsakan Conflicts/Legends|Alsakan Conflicts]], Arrgaw's strategic position allowed it to become an important trade center supporting the wide-spread [[Colonist/Legends|settlement]] of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]]. The planet was known as one of the wealthiest worlds of the Expansion Region [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] later, and [[Refinery/Legends|refineries]] at Arrgaw were used to process the highly unstable [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]]—basis for much of the hard [[Currency/Legends|currency]] used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Description==
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Arrgaw<ref name="TEA" /> was located in the [[Star system/Legends|star system]] of the [[Arrgaw system/Legends|same name]].<ref name="TSoK Arrgaw">[[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']] — Based on corresponding data for [[Arrgaw system/Legends|Arrgaw system]]</ref> It was a part of the [[Kira sector/Legends|Kira sector]]<ref name="EAOC Arrgaw" /> and lay within the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="TEA" />

Arrgaw occupied a strategic position in [[Realspace/Legends|space]], as it was situated at the intersection of the<ref name="TEA" /> important<ref name="TSoK">[[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']]</ref> [[Harrin Trade Corridor]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] and the [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]] known as the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]]. The Hydian Way connected the planet to the<ref name="TEA" /> Kira [[Sector/Legends|sector's]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> [[Pax system/Legends|Pax system]] and the [[Ramordia system/Legends|Ramordia system]]<ref name="TEA" /> in the [[Majoor sector/Legends|Majoor sector]].<ref name="EAOC" />

The Harrin Trade Corridor linked Arrgaw with the [[Lazerian system/Legends|Lazerian system]]<ref name="TEA" /> in the Kira sector<ref name="EAOC" /> and the [[Jurzan system/Legends|Jurzan system]],<ref name="TEA" /> located in the [[Jurzan sector/Legends|eponymous sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Traveling from Arrgaw on a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] equipped with a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], the Lazerian system could be reached in twenty-three [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]], while traveling to the [[Lohopa system/Legends|Lohopa system]],<ref name="TSoK Arrgaw" /> located further along the Trade Corridor<ref name="TEA" /> in the [[Boeus sector/Legends|Boeus sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> took three [[Standard day/Legends|days]] and five hours.<ref name="TSoK Arrgaw" />

==History==
Following the [[First Alsakan Conflict|beginning]] of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-spanning [[Alsakan Conflicts/Legends|Alsakan Conflicts]]<ref name="TEA" /> in approximately [[17,018 BBY]],<ref name="EGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> Arrgaw, one of<ref name="TEA" /> eleven major<ref name="TSoK" /> [[Merchant/Legends|trading]] centers located on the Harrin Trade Corridor, served as an anchor world for the active [[Colonist/Legends|settlement]] of the Trailing Sectors portion of the Expansion Region. The planet's economy, along with that of the other Harrin trade worlds, was eventually linked to the major [[Enarc Run/Legends|Enarc Run]] hyperlane by the blazing of the<ref name="TEA" /> short route known as the [[Kira Run]].<ref name="TSoK" />

[[File:TrailingSectorsExpansionRegion-TEAExtra.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Arrgaw occupied a strategic position in the Trailing Sectors portion of the Expansion Region.]]
By the [[Time/Legends|time]] the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] reigned [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] later, Arrgaw remained a powerful trade world and was considered to be one of the wealthiest planets in the entire Expansion Region. A significant portion of the Trailing Sectors' wealth was tied to Arrgaw and was under the control of [[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]], [[Homeworld/Legends|natives]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].<ref name="FDCR" />

Arrgaw still played an important part in [[galactic economy]] following the establishment of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]<ref name="FaFKM" /> in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> [[Nova crystal/Legends|Nova crystals]], a type of [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] [[Mining/Legends|mined]] on the [[Temperature/Legends|warm]]<ref name="FaFKM" /> [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="EAOC Opiteihr">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Opiteihr system/Legends|Opiteihr system]]</ref> planet [[Krann]], provided the basis for a large portion of New Republic's hard [[Currency/Legends|currency]]. However, the heat-sensitive [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]] were unstable and highly explosive, necessitating their [[Transport/Legends|transportation]] offworld to Arrgaw, where they could be processed for safe fiscal use.<ref name="FaFKM" />

==Locations==
Arrgaw was a world covered in an expansive sprawl of warehouses and corporate [[Administrator/Legends|administrative]] spires. However, the planet's surface features were dwarfed by the impressiveness of the trade rings located in Arrgaw's [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]], which had become famous by the time of the Galactic Empire.<ref name="FDCR" /> Arrgaw was also the site of [[Refinery/Legends|refineries]] used to bond nova crystals to inert trace elements, thereby stabilizing the former.<ref name="FaFKM" />

==Behind the scenes==
Arrgaw was first mentioned in "[[For a Few Kilotons More]]," a ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' adventure written by [[Michael Allen Horne|Michael Horne]] and published by [[West End Games]] in the [[1993]] book [[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']].<ref name="FaFKM" />

The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Arrgaw system, and therefore Arrgaw itself, in grid square N-15. The book also depicted the system on a map, albeit placing it in square N-16.<ref name="TEA" /> The [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] to ''The Essential Atlas'' later confirmed that the system was located in grid square N-16.<ref name="EAOC Arrgaw" />
